category_sources: source_facts.description says Links is a Lynx-like WWW browser; official user documentation describes the Links web browser in text and graphics modes.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is links; official homepage https://links.twibright.com/ and official manual use Links naming.
docs_sources: Official Links site hosts the English user documentation at links.twibright.com/user_en.html.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official site provides source archives but no official source-control repository was confirmed.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a WWW browser; official user documentation describes text-mode and graphics-mode browser operation.
